steps.title: Locate the Text's Two Functions
steps.content: The passage describes what researchers discovered (CO₂ in WASP-39b via wavelength measurements), then the final sentence shifts to why it matters: “This finding not only offers...but also illustrates the potential.” This structure—from discovery to significance—is the defining feature.

steps.title: Apply This Structure to the Choices
steps.content: Choice B states: “describes how researchers made a scientific discovery, then explains the importance of that discovery.” This directly matches the passage's movement. The other options incorrectly reference alternative methods being compared, detailed study steps being outlined, or other scientists challenging the conclusion—none of which occur in the text. That matches choice B — B is correct.
